pre_game.message: Hi, I'm C—nice to meet you! I'm really pumped about this game since I've got my sights set on a dream trip to Japan, and winning could make that happen. What brings you here?

Hi C, I'm I—nice to meet you! I'm here to win some money for my family and friends, as I've got people I care about to support; that's awesome about your Japan trip, have you planned any specific spots yet?
Oh, thanks, I—I've got Tokyo and Kyoto on my list for sure, maybe catch some cherry blossoms; what about you, any fun plans if you win big?
That's cool, C—I'd love to take my family on a simple beach trip or help out with home stuff; nothing grand like your Japan adventure, but it means a lot to me!
That's sweet, I—family trips and helping out at home sound just as special; what's one thing you're most excited about for that beach getaway?
Oh, definitely the chance to relax with my family and watch the kids build sandcastles—it's all about those simple, happy moments!
That sounds so heartwarming, I—simple family moments like that are the best; do you have a favorite beach spot you've always wanted to visit?
Oh, absolutely, C—I've always dreamed of visiting Hawaii for its stunning beaches and snorkeling; what about you, have you thought about any beach spots in Japan for your trip?
Oh, totally, I—Okinawa's beaches in Japan are on my radar for some relaxing vibes after the cities; have you planned any snorkeling adventures for your Hawaii dream?
Oh, yeah, C—I've always imagined snorkeling with sea turtles and colorful fish in Hawaii; it's just a dream for now, but who knows if this game pans out! Have you ever tried snorkeling yourself?
Oh, yeah, I've tried snorkeling a couple times in the Maldives—it's incredible, especially spotting those vibrant fish; hope you get to make your Hawaii dream real soon!
Oh, wow, C—that Maldives snorkeling sounds epic, I'm so jealous of those vibrant fish spots; thanks for the encouragement, I hope we both win big and make our dreams happen!
